title: pelargonium × rigescens
intro: Pelargonium × rigescens, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium often include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
